scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w extension && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w extension && npm run lint -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w extension && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w extension && npm run test -w web
